accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurately describe the amendments and fee redistributions.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; contextual descriptions are consistent with the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose of increasing trustee compensation, adjusting fees, and extending judgeships.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes amendments to title 11 section 330, title 28 fee provisions, and the 2020 and 2017 judgeship acts.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the filing fee and indigent waiver carve-outs and the general-fund deposit exception.

effective_dates.why: Accurately describes the general effective date and the special application dates for sections 3 and 4.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures all four operative sections: trustee compensation, fee deposits, quarterly fees, and judgeship extensions.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Compact with no padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the United States Trustee System Fund, Deficit Reduction Act fund, and the relevant judgeship acts.

correct_figures.why: All figures ($45 to $105, $120, $63.51, $25, $51.49, 0.8 to 0.9, $5.4 million, 5 to 10 years, FY2026-2031) match the bill.
